changes_made: Changed k8s_ingress_controller_dos_protection_enabled to k8s_ingress_dos_protection_enabled for consistency with resource naming conventions
review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes as they address denial-of-service protection through network policies, ingress controllers, and service meshes. The naming mostly follows conventions, but a minor adjustment was made for consistency. The functions are technically accurate and map to real Kubernetes security controls.
naming_improvements: Ensure consistent use of resource names like 'ingress' instead of 'ingress_controller' to align with naming standards
title: Denial-Of-Service Protection - [ selection: protect against; limit...
step1_reasoning: The control SC-5-a focuses on protecting against or limiting denial-of-service (DoS) attacks. In Kubernetes, this can be addressed through network policies that implement rate limiting, ingress controllers that provide DoS protection features, and service meshes that offer traffic management and resilience features to mitigate DoS attacks.
